backend: bitsandbytes Linear8bitLt (vector-wise int8 with fp16 outlier path disabled)
interpretation_note: bitsandbytes int8 is optimized for >1B-param LLMs where weight memory bandwidth dominates. For an 86M-param model on 16GB VRAM the dequant overhead exceeds the bandwidth saving, hence latency regression. The MAIN finding is the 0.9988 cosine fidelity and 0.947 top-5 rank agreement, which substantially exceeds typical int8-quantized BERT/ViT (which need gating/clipping fixes to reach this level).
